form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 5th of 10 at Pukekohe on April 1 over 1200m, in the wet; 3.5 len behind Tiantai carrying 57.5kg at $17.80. Previously second-up 4th of 7 at New Plymouth Raceway Mdn-Sw on February 14 2025 over 1200m, slow going 4 len behind Hana Man carrying 56.5kg at $11.70. Strips fitter and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at this track January 23 over 1200m, soft track; 1.4 len behind Convinced with 55kg at $2.70. On debut second of 10 at Arawa Park December 5 over 1230m, soft track; a nose behind Cheeky Devil with 55.5kg at $2.20. This is an ideal race to kick off. At the latest outing she finished second over 1200m at this track on January 23.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. The race before that 2nd of 12 at Pukekohe on February 25 over 1200m, on a slow track; head behind Le Jacques Cartier with 55.5kg at $6.70. One of the leading chances.
